title: Armor Detachment is now available from Professional Mode.
changes: Added the Armor Detachment control window under Professional Mode > Effects.
Added automatic slide-to-floor detachment so loose armor follows the body and collapses when it reaches the ground.
Default detachment modes are now off until explicitly enabled.
Detach on monster hit is hidden unless Dev Experimental is available.
Standardized plugin versioning to the four-part Dalamud assembly version format.
